summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified AI Description Generator feature. All backend API tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI tests pass - Unified Series Description section visible in Bulk Category Editor with Brief/Standard/Detailed buttons working correctly. Generated descriptions populate the Description Template textarea.

evidence: Returns 404 when no products found for series
Returns 400 when neither series_name nor product_skus provided
Aggregated data contains sizes, finishes, materials correctly
Default length is 'standard' when not specified

frontend_unified_series_description_sect.location: Bulk Category Editor modal > Description & SEO section
evidence: Green/teal gradient section visible with Layers icon
Brief, Standard, Detailed buttons present with data-testid attributes
Buttons trigger API call and show loading spinner
Generated description displays with collection name and product count
Aggregated data badges show (X Sizes, X Finishes)
Copy button available to copy description

critical_code_review_comments: Feature implementation is complete and working correctly
API uses emergentintegrations library for LLM calls (not mocked)
data-testid attributes properly added for all three buttons
Error handling works correctly (404 for no products, 400 for missing params)
seed_data_creation: Used existing LEPORCE supplier products (223 products, Alabaster series)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified AI Description Generator feature is fully functional. Backend endpoint POST /api/products/generate-series-description accepts series_name, product_skus, seo_keywords, and length parameters. Frontend UI in Bulk Category Editor shows green/teal section with Brief/Standard/Detailed buttons. Uses emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for AI generation.

dashboard_historical_entries_500.description: Dashboard shows 500 error for historical entries API
dashboard_historical_entries_500.impact: Low - does not affect the tested feature
dashboard_historical_entries_500.note: Pre-existing issue, not related to Unified Series Description feature
